company_name: Ca Majestic Landscape Maintenance And Pool Service

hero.headline:
Sacramento's Pool Experts Since
2001
hero.subheadline: For over 25 years, Sacramento families and businesses have trusted us to keep their pools sparkling clean and their landscapes looking pristine. We handle everything so you can just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Pool & Landscape Care That<br class="hidden md:block">Keeps Your Property Beautiful
services.subtitle: From weekly pool maintenance to full landscape management, we handle commercial and residential properties across the Greater Sacramento Area with 25 years of expertise.

cards.title: Residential Pool Service
cards.description: Weekly chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming, and filter maintenance for homeowners. Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season long.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Full-service pool maintenance for hotels, hospitals, office complexes, and HOAs. Reliable scheduling and detailed reporting your property manager will love.

cards.title: Green Pool Restoration
cards.description: Neglected pool turned green? Our specialized restoration process brings it back to clean, clear, and swimmable condition — faster than you expect.

cards.title: Equipment Repairs
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, and salt systems diagnosed and repaired by Hayward Authorized technicians. Most repairs completed in a single visit.

cards.title: Filter & Tile Cleaning
cards.description: Routine filter cleanings, tile descaling, and tile repairs that extend the life of your pool and restore its original beauty.

cards.title: Landscape Maintenance
cards.description: Professional landscape care for commercial and residential properties — mowing, trimming, irrigation, and seasonal clean-ups to keep your grounds immaculate.

steps.title: Call or Request a Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool or landscape. We'll provide an honest, no-pressure quote and can usually schedule your first visit within the week.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our licensed, experienced technicians arrive on schedule with Hayward-authorized equipment. Cleaning, chemicals, repairs, landscaping — all handled.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Property
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling and your landscape stays pristine. We're not satisfied until you are — that's been our promise since 2001.

about.label: Why Sacramento Trusts Us
about.headline: 25 Years of Keeping Sacramento Pools Sparkling
about.description: Since 2001, California Majestic has been the Greater Sacramento Area's go-to for pool service and landscape maintenance. We're fully licensed (CSLB #794263), BBB Accredited with an A+ rating, and a proud Hayward Authorized Dealer. From Folsom to Elk Grove, Roseville to Davis — our technicians treat every property like their own.

features.title: Licensed & BBB Accredited
features.description: CSLB Licensed contractor #794263 with a BBB A+ rating. Fully insured and properly registered for your peace of mind.

features.title: Commercial & Residential
features.description: Hotels, hospitals, office parks, and family homes — we serve them all with the same attention to detail and professionalism.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: We're not satisfied until you are. If something isn't right, we come back and fix it at no extra charge. That's our commitment.

pricing.headline: Affordable Rates. Honest Pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Surprisingly affordable service from licensed, experienced professionals. Get a custom quote for your property — no hidden fees, no surprises.

guarantee.headline: Our "Not Satisfied Until You Are" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely happy with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right — at no additional cost. We've built our reputation on this promise for over 25 years, and we're not about to stop now.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer faster response times. Call us at (916) 638-2607 and we'll work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Do you service both residential and commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We maintain pools for homeowners, hotels, hospitals, HOAs, office complexes, and more across 19 Sacramento-area communities. Commercial clients get tailored maintenance plans.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the Greater Sacramento Area including Elk Grove, Folsom, Roseville, Rocklin, Citrus Heights, Carmichael, Fair Oaks, Granite Bay, Rancho Cordova, Davis, and many more communities.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. We hold CSLB License #794263, are BBB Accredited with an A+ rating, and are a Hayward Authorized Dealer. We carry full liability insurance on every job.

faqs.question: What makes you different from other pool services?
faqs.answer: 25 years of experience, a BBB A+ rating, Hayward Authorized Dealer status, and a simple promise: we're not satisfied until you are. Our rates are surprisingly affordable for the level of service we provide.

testimonials.name: Honey C.
testimonials.text: When I called for their rates I was surprised at how inexpensive their services are. My pool tech was awesome, knowledgeable, funny & quick!

testimonials.name: Chavo B.
testimonials.text: This is awesome service. The employees are very professional and know what they're doing. Highly recommend for anyone in the Sacramento area.

testimonials.name: Long-time Client
testimonials.text: They have been servicing our pool for over 13 years. Professional, honest and reliable. You won't find a more dependable pool service in Sacramento.
